evaluators.name: Cheapest 10-inch 5µm Sediment Cartridges x2 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the cart contains at least two units of the cheapest qualifying 10" 5-micron sediment cartridge under $40.

evaluators.name: Cheapest 20L RO Anti-Scalant x3 with Free Shipping Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the cart contains three units of the cheapest qualifying 20 L RO anti-scalant under $250 with free shipping.

evaluators.name: Highest-Flow Digital Dosing Pump Under $1200 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the cart contains a qualifying digital dosing pump under $1,200 with rating ≥4.5, and whether the selected pump has the highest flow rate among qualifiers.

evaluators.name: 3-Stage 10-inch Filter Set (Sediment, Carbon, 1µm Polishing) Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the cart contains a 3-stage 10" set: one qualifying sediment, one carbon block, and one 1µm polishing cartridge (each under $60, rating ≥4), and whether each type is the cheapest qualifying option.

evaluators.name: Cheapest 4040 RO Membrane x3 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the cart contains three units of the cheapest qualifying 4040 RO membrane with ≥98% salt rejection under $350.

evaluators.name: Compare 3 Conductivity Meters and Add Highest-Range Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether at least three qualifying conductivity meters (under $500, rating ≥4) were added to comparison, and whether the cart contains the compared meter with the highest maximum conductivity range.

evaluators.name: Cheapest Softener (2–3 m³/h) and 3×25kg Salt Bags Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the cart contains a qualifying water softener (2–3 m³/h, under $2,000) and three qualifying 25 kg salt bags under $25 with free shipping, and whether the cheapest options were chosen.

evaluators.name: Keep Cheapest 20-inch Stainless Housing, Quantity 4 Evaluator
evaluators.description: Checks whether the cart ends up with only the cheapest qualifying 20" stainless steel filter housing under $600 and that its quantity is set to four units.
